SCADA Standards Appendix A 
HFC AWTP Master Plan

SCADA Standards Appendix A ­
Definitions and General Reference 
January 2025 
148
artifact_summary: Table defining SCADA tags, device types, addresses, and descriptions for Hazen SCADA Standards Appendix A, covering actuators, motors, and PID controllers.
artifact_blurb: A structured data table enumerating SCADA system tags, associated device types, network addresses, and functional descriptions for general variables and configuration parameters. Specifically details operational settings for actuators, motors, and PID controllers as defined in the Hazen SCADA Standards Appendix A.
